title: Post-Graduate Diploma in Cyber Security with Artificial Intelligence
content: M.Tech.* MCA/ MSc (CS/IT/ allied branches) B.Tech.(CSE/IT/ECE) / BE (CSE/IT/ECE) BCA/B.Sc. (Computer Science/Information Technology)# *Working professionals in Cyber Security or allied branches with minimum 3 years of experience #Working professionals in Cyber Security or allied branches with minimum 5 years of experience Graduates of the PG Diploma in Cyber Security with Artificial Intelligence may pursue roles such as: 01 Establish strong conceptual foundations in cyber security architectures, threat landscapes, and attack vectors. 02 Apply Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning techniques for threat detection, anomaly analysis, and cyber defense automation. 03 Equip learners with practical expertise in digital forensics, incident response, and cyber-crime investigation. 04 Build competency in securing networks, systems, applications, cloud, and AI-enabled infrastructures. 05 Develop advanced hands-on skills in ethical hacking, penetration testing, and cyber defense mechanisms. 06 Instill comprehensive knowledge of cyber laws, governance, risk management, and compliance (GRC). 07 Prepare industry-ready professionals for entry-level cyber security roles and professional certifications through intensive laboratories and project-based learning. M.Tech.* MCA/ MSc (CS/IT/ allied branches) B.Tech.(CSE/IT/ECE) / BE (CSE/IT/ECE) BCA/B.Sc. (Computer Science/Information Technology)# *Working professionals in Cyber Security or allied branches with minimum 3 years of experience #Working professionals in Cyber Security or allied branches with minimum 5 years of experience
